ddls:
CREATE TABLE "players" (
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player */,
  "player_name" TEXT /* Full name of the player */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the team the player belongs to */,
  "position" TEXT /* Playing position of the player */,
  "nationality" TEXT /* Nationality of the player */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the player */,
  "height" INTEGER /* Height of the player in centimeters */,
  "weight" INTEGER /* Weight of the player in kilograms */,
  "foot" TEXT /* Preferred foot of the player (left or right) */,
  "injury_status" TEXT /* Current injury status of the player */,
  "market_value" REAL /* Current market value of the player in euros */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_players_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the football team */,
  "league_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the league the team participates in */,
  "stadium" TEXT /* Name of the team's stadium */,
  "coach_name" TEXT /* Name of the team's coach */,
  "founded" INTEGER /* Year the team was founded */,
  "website" TEXT /* Official website of the team */,
  "social_media" TEXT /* Social media handles of the team */,
  "budget" REAL /* Annual budget of the team in euros */,
  "number_of_players" INTEGER /* Number of players in the team's squad */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "leagues" (
  "league_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each league */,
  "league_name" TEXT /* Name of the football league */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the league is based */,
  "number_of_teams" INTEGER /* Number of teams in the league */,
  "champion_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the team that won the league in the most recent season */,
  "top_scorer_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the player who was the top scorer in the most recent season */,
  "website" TEXT /* Official website of the league */,
  "social_media" TEXT /* Social media handles of the league */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("league_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_leagues_top_scorer_id FOREIGN KEY ("top_scorer_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_leagues_champion_id FOREIGN KEY ("champion_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "matches" (
  "match_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each match */,
  "home_team_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the home team */,
  "away_team_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the away team */,
  "match_date" TEXT /* Date when the match took place */,
  "venue" TEXT /* Stadium where the match was played */,
  "result" TEXT /* Result of the match */,
  "attendance" INTEGER /* Number of spectators at the match */,
  "referee" TEXT /* Name of the referee who officiated the match */,
  "weather_conditions" TEXT /* Weather conditions during the match */,
  "home_team_goals" INTEGER /* Number of goals scored by the home team */,
  "away_team_goals" INTEGER /* Number of goals scored by the away team */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("match_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_matches_home_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("home_team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_matches_away_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("away_team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "goals" (
  "goal_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each goal */,
  "match_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the match where the goal was scored */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the player who scored the goal */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the team that scored the goal */,
  "minute_scored" INTEGER /* Minute in which the goal was scored */,
  "goal_type" TEXT /* Type of goal (e.g., penalty, header) */,
  "assister_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the player who assisted the goal */,
  "is_own_goal" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the goal was an own goal */,
  "video_url" TEXT /* URL to a video clip of the goal */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("goal_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_goals_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_goals_match_id FOREIGN KEY ("match_id") REFERENCES matches ("match_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_goals_assister_id FOREIGN KEY ("assister_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_goals_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_statistics" (
  "stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player's statistics record */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the player */,
  "goals_scored" INTEGER /* Total number of goals scored by the player */,
  "assists" INTEGER /* Total number of assists made by the player */,
  "yellow_cards" INTEGER /* Total number of yellow cards received by the player */,
  "red_cards" INTEGER /* Total number of red cards received by the player */,
  "minutes_played" INTEGER /* Total number of minutes played by the player */,
  "shots_on_target" INTEGER /* Total number of shots on target */,
  "shots_off_target" INTEGER /* Total number of shots off target */,
  "fouls_committed" INTEGER /* Total number of fouls committed by the player */,
  "fouls_suffered" INTEGER /* Total number of fouls suffered by the player */,
  "penalties_taken" INTEGER /* Total number of penalties taken by the player */,
  "penalties_scored" INTEGER /* Total number of penalties scored by the player */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_statistics_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "team_statistics" (
  "stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team's statistics record */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the team */,
  "matches_played" INTEGER /* Total number of matches played by the team */,
  "wins" INTEGER /* Total number of wins by the team */,
  "losses" INTEGER /* Total number of losses by the team */,
  "draws" INTEGER /* Total number of draws by the team */,
  "goals_for" INTEGER /* Total number of goals scored by the team */,
  "goals_against" INTEGER /* Total number of goals conceded by the team */,
  "clean_sheets" INTEGER /* Total number of clean sheets (matches where the team did not concede a goal) */,
  "yellow_cards_given" INTEGER /* Total number of yellow cards given to the team */,
  "red_cards_given" INTEGER /* Total number of red cards given to the team */,
  "shots_on_target_against" INTEGER /* Total number of shots on target against the team */,
  "shots_off_target_against" INTEGER /* Total number of shots off target against the team */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_team_statistics_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_accounts" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for authentication */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., fan, scout, coach) */,
  "full_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the user */,
  "date_joined" TEXT /* Date the user joined the platform */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "subscriptions" (
  "subscription_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each subscription */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who subscribed */,
  "subscription_type" TEXT /* Type of subscription (e.g., monthly, annual) */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the subscription */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the subscription */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Payment method used for the subscription */,
  "renewal_date" TEXT /* Date when the subscription is due for renewal */,
  "auto_renew" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the subscription is set to auto-renew */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("subscription_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_subscriptions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES user_accounts ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "match_reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each match report */,
  "match_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the match the report is about */,
  "author_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the author of the report */,
  "report_title" TEXT /* Title of the match report */,
  "content" TEXT /* Content of the match report */,
  "publish_date" TEXT /* Date when the report was published */,
  "number_of_views" INTEGER /* Number of views the report has received */,
  "number_of_comments" INTEGER /* Number of comments on the report */,
  "rating" REAL /* Average rating of the report (on a scale of 1 to 5) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_match_reports_match_id FOREIGN KEY ("match_id") REFERENCES matches ("match_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_match_reports_author_id FOREIGN KEY ("author_id") REFERENCES authors ("author_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "authors" (
  "author_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each author */,
  "author_name" TEXT /* Full name of the author */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the author */,
  "biography" TEXT /* Biography of the author */,
  "number_of_reports" INTEGER /* Total number of reports written by the author */,
  "average_rating" REAL /* Average rating of the author's reports (on a scale of 1 to 5) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("author_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_transfers" (
  "transfer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player transfer */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the player who was transferred */,
  "from_team_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the team the player transferred from */,
  "to_team_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the team the player transferred to */,
  "transfer_date" TEXT /* Date when the transfer occurred */,
  "transfer_fee" REAL /* Transfer fee paid for the player */,
  "contract_expiration" TEXT /* Date when the player's contract with the new team expires */,
  "transfer_status" TEXT /* Status of the transfer (e.g., completed, pending, failed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("transfer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_transfers_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_transfers_to_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("to_team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_transfers_from_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("from_team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "team_sponsorships" (
  "sponsorship_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sponsorship */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the team that is sponsored */,
  "sponsor_name" TEXT /* Name of the sponsor */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the sponsorship */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the sponsorship */,
  "sponsorship_amount" REAL /* Amount of money for the sponsorship */,
  "logo_url" TEXT /* URL to the sponsor's logo */,
  "logo_placement" TEXT /* Placement of the sponsor's logo on the team's kit (e.g., chest, sleeve) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sponsorship_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_team_sponsorships_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)
